summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin functionality for Andre Dev agency website - all admin features working correctly including setup, login, dashboard, user management, project management, and access control

design_issues.issue: Minor React hydration warning for HTML structure (span inside tbody)
Dialog component missing description attribute for accessibility

passed_tests: Backend: All 22 API tests passed including admin functionality
Backend: Admin setup endpoint (/api/admin/setup) working correctly
Backend: Admin login and authentication working
Backend: Admin dashboard stats (/api/admin/stats) returning correct data
Backend: Admin can view all contacts (/api/admin/contacts)
Backend: Admin can view all users (/api/admin/users)
Backend: Admin can view all projects (/api/admin/projects)
Backend: Admin can update project status (/api/admin/projects/{id}/status)
Backend: Admin can view all messages (/api/admin/messages)
Backend: Admin can reply to messages (/api/admin/messages/{id}/reply)
Backend: Regular users correctly denied access to admin endpoints (403)
Frontend: Admin setup page loads correctly and detects existing admin
Frontend: Admin login successful and redirects to admin dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard displays statistics cards correctly
Frontend: Admin sidebar navigation works for all pages (Dashboard, Contacts, Users, Projects, Messages)
Frontend: Admin contacts page displays contact submissions
Frontend: Admin users page displays registered users in table format
Frontend: Admin projects page displays all projects with status management
Frontend: Admin project status update functionality working
Frontend: Admin messages page displays all user messages
Frontend: Admin message reply functionality working with modal dialog
Frontend: Unauthorized access to admin routes correctly blocked and redirected to login
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (22/22 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor accessibility warnings only)
